title: hypericum psilophytum
intro: Hypericum psilophytum, also known as the dwarf St. John's Wort or Spurred Wintergreen, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of the Balkan Peninsula. It belongs to the St. John's Wort family and has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The plant is known to provide several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving anxiety and stress, and improving wound healing. Hypericum psilophytum can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its effectiveness and safety should be evaluated by a healthcare professional before use.
